greeting: a terminal. of course there is. ask for what you need.
help: cat about     -> the long version about me
cat resume    -> the PDF, for the formal
blog          -> just guess where it takes you
theme         -> day | night | sun. sun follows the actual sky
snake         -> take over the one in the back. arrows. esc to leave it
life          -> reseed the cells in the Game of Life
kanban        -> an old board I never finished. fitting
secrets       -> how many you have found. not which
unknown: not a command. I respect the attempt.
no. but type `help` and we can pretend this went well.
command not found. believe me, I know the feeling.
I wrote every command in here and that is not one of them.
globeLines: Valsad. home. the office is a beach now.
Surat. the degree said chemistry. it meant wizardry.
Pune. seat C-32. the manager sat at C-31.
Bengaluru. employee number one of three.
tathastu: so it is. you read consoles and follow instructions. rare combination.
secretsAllFound: all of them. there is nothing left to find here. there was never much, only a man and his machines.
snakeStart: it is yours. arrows move it. esc gives it back.
